mapper.sql: model_id, model_type, model_name, model_no, url, ori_url, auth_token, status, is_support_chart, is_deepthink, max_content_token, in_params, inparam_template, create_by, create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT distinct a.model_id, a.model_type, a.model_name, a.model_no, a.url, a.ori_url, a.auth_token, a.status, a.is_support_chart, a.is_deepthink, a.max_content_token, a.in_params, a.inparam_template, a.create_by, a.create_time, CASE WHEN d.obj_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_default FROM byai_aimodel a LEFT JOIN byai_tag_relation d ON a.model_id = d.obj_id AND d.obj_type = 'AI_MODEL'
ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM byai_aimodel a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT obj_id FROM byai_tag_relation WHERE obj_type = 'AI_MODEL' GROUP BY obj_id ) d ON a.model_id = d.obj_id
